# Password Key Derivation Module

Implement a key derivation module that produces a cryptographic key from a user password using a standard password-based key derivation function.

## Capabilities

### Derive key from password

Given a password, salt, iteration count, and desired key length, return a derived key buffer.

- Deriving a key from password `"password"`, salt `"salt"`, 100000 iterations, 32-byte key length with `"sha256"` digest returns a consistent Buffer of 32 bytes [@test](./tests/derive-basic.test.js)
- The same inputs always produce the same output (deterministic) [@test](./tests/derive-deterministic.test.js)
- Different passwords produce different derived keys [@test](./tests/derive-different-password.test.js)
- Different salts produce different derived keys [@test](./tests/derive-different-salt.test.js)

## Implementation

[@generates](./src/index.js)

## API

```javascript { #api }
/**
 * Synchronously derive a cryptographic key from a password.
 * @param {string} password - The user password
 * @param {string|Buffer} salt - Random salt value
 * @param {number} iterations - Number of PBKDF2 iterations
 * @param {number} keyLength - Desired key length in bytes
 * @param {string} digest - Hash digest algorithm (e.g. "sha256", "sha512")
 * @returns {Buffer} The derived key
 */
export function deriveKey(password, salt, iterations, keyLength, digest);
```

## Dependencies { .dependencies }

### crypto-browserify { .dependency }

Provides browser-compatible implementation of Node.js's `crypto` module, including pbkdf2Sync for password-based key derivation.

[@satisfied-by](crypto-browserify)
